title: Sand World Generator
description: Perfect plugin for a CPvP server. It generates a sand world.
body:
## Crystal PvP Sand World Plugin

This plugin generates a custom sand world perfect for Crystal PvP battles. It creates a desert-themed arena with open space for intense PvP combat, ideal for high-speed action and strategic gameplay. Enhance your Crystal PvP server with a challenging, unique environment for players to fight in.

## Tested Versions
1.20.1 - 1.21.4

## Features
1. -64 Deep Ground
2. Best for Crystal PvP
3. Multiverse Core 
4. For Free

## How to Install
1. Download the Plugin and [Multiverse Core](https://modrinth.com/plugin/multiverse-core)
2. Drag it in to your Plugins Folder
3. Go to bukkit.yml and set this to the worlds section

```
   worlds:
    sandpvp:
      generator: SandWorldGenerator
```

4. Restart the Server
5. Execute this Command: 
```
/mv create nameofworld normal -g SandWorldGenerator
```

6. Have fun!
